Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class ExternalServiceRegistration2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.ExternalServiceRegistration2
public class ExternalServiceRegistration2 extends SObject

Java class for ExternalServiceRegistration complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ExternalServiceRegistration">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeveloperName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Language" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ManageableState" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MasterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Metadata" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}ExternalServiceRegistration" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NamedCredential" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NamedCredentialReference" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}NamedCredential" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NamedCredentialReferenceId" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NamespacePrefix" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProviderAssetEndpoint" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RegistrationProviderType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Schema" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SchemaAbsoluteUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SchemaType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SchemaUploadFileExtension" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SchemaUploadFileName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SchemaUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ServiceBinding" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Status" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
